---
title: "Cairngorm Snow"
description: "Hosting a Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF on GitHub Pages"
format: html
---

## About This Data

This data was generated using the SPUN deep learning model for mapping snow cover from Sentinel-2 imagery. The model was used to create Snow Cover Fraction (SCF) maps for the entire Sentinel-2 time series, all of these were combined and normalised by cloud-free view to give an estimate of snow persistence.

### Access Links

You can access the raw hosted files here:

*   **Raw COG:** [`SP_CNP_AllYears_pooled_2016-2026.tif`](data/SP_CNP_AllYears_pooled_2016-2026_COG.tif)
*   *STAC JSON: (Coming soon)*

---

## Web Visualization

*Once you generate your STAC JSON (as discussed previously) and place it in the `data/` folder, you can embed the Development Seed STAC Map directly into this Quarto page using an iframe like the one below:*

```html
<!-- Uncomment and update the URL once your JSON is hosted -->

<iframe 
  src="https://developmentseed.org/stac-map/?url=https://leamhowe.github.io/data/stac_item.json" 
  width="100%" 
  height="600px" 
  style="border: none; border-radius: 8px;">
</iframe>
